name: I-Doxycycline
description: I-Broad-spectrum tetracycline antibiotic. I-Oral ulcer prophylaxis ehlukile yeziguli ze-penicillin-allergic. Isebenza futhi ngokumelene nezidalwa ezingavamile kanye nezinye izifo ezithwalwa yizilwane (umalaleveva prophylaxis ezindaweni ezihlala njalo).
dose: 100 mg PO njalo ngamahora angu-12 x izinsuku ezingu-7.
window: Qala phakathi kwamahora angu-3 wokulimala ukuze uthole i-nxeba prophylaxis.
contraindications: Ukukhulelwa (kwenza izinyo le-fetus lishintshe umbala kanye nokuvimbela ukukhula kwamathambo)
warnings: OKUNGAVIMBIWE ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa -- sebenzisa i-amoxicillin esikhundleni salokho.
I-Photosensitivity - yeluleka isiguli ukuthi sigweme ukuchayeka elangeni.
Ungathathi nokudla okunothe nge-calcium, ama-antacid, noma i-iron -- kuphazamisa ukumuncwa.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated ngaphansi kweminyaka engu-8. Iminyaka engu-8+: 2-4 mg/kg/ngosuku ihlukaniswe i-q12h (ubukhulu obungu-100 mg/umthamo).
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-amoxicillin ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-8.

obstetric.note: KUVIMBIWE ekukhulelweni -- kubangela ukulimala kwengane. Kunalokho sebenzisa i-amoxicillin.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
